title: Windmannia ovata
taxonomy: Windmannia ovata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Diapensiaceae. This family is a group of small, herbaceous plants commonly known as the prince's-feather family. The Diapensiaceae family belongs to the order Diapensiales and is part of the larger clade of flowering plants called the angiosperms. Within the Diapensiaceae family, Windmannia ovata is one of the many species that can be found, primarily in tropical regions of Central and South America. Its classification helps in understanding its unique characteristics and its place in the plant kingdom.
